address: 2200 North Ocean Boulevard, Myrtle Beach, SC, USA

nearbyCategories.description: Enjoy a variety of dining experiences within a short walk or drive. Many restaurants are located along Ocean Boulevard, offering options like 'Pier 14 Restaurant & Lounge' and casual beachfront eateries. Average drive time: 5-10 minutes.
notable_places: Dirty Don's Oyster Bar and Grill
nearbyCategories.image_prompt: Photorealistic image of a family enjoying dinner at a beachfront restaurant in Myrtle Beach, with the ocean visible in the background. Warm lighting and a lively atmosphere.

nearbyCategories.category: Local Coffee Shops and Breakfast Spots
nearbyCategories.description: Start your day with a caffeine fix and delicious breakfast pastries. Several cafes like 'Dunkin'' are nearby. Walking distance: 5-15 minutes, or a quick drive.
nearbyCategories.image_prompt: Photorealistic image of a cozy coffee shop interior in Myrtle Beach, with patrons enjoying coffee and pastries. Sunlight streaming through the windows and a relaxed atmosphere.

nearbyCategories.description: Explore famous landmarks like 'Broadway at the Beach' and the 'Myrtle Beach SkyWheel'. Driving distance: 10-20 minutes.
nearbyCategories.image_prompt: Photorealistic aerial view of Broadway at the Beach in Myrtle Beach, showcasing the attractions, shops, and restaurants. Bright sunny day with clear blue skies.

nearbyCategories.description: Engage in exciting activities such as mini-golf, water parks, and jet ski rentals. 'Myrtle Waves Water Park' is a popular choice. Driving distance: 15-25 minutes.
nearbyCategories.image_prompt: Photorealistic image of people enjoying various water activities at a water park in Myrtle Beach. Smiling faces, colorful slides, and a sense of fun and excitement.

nearbyCategories.category: Convenient Grocery Stores and Essential Shopping
nearbyCategories.description: Stock up on vacation essentials at nearby grocery stores like 'Piggly Wiggly'. Driving distance: 5-10 minutes.
nearbyCategories.image_prompt: Photorealistic image of a well-stocked grocery store aisle in Myrtle Beach, featuring fresh produce, snacks, and beverages commonly purchased by vacationers.

nearbyCategories.category: Myrtle Beach's Diverse Shopping Centers and Boutiques
nearbyCategories.description: Find souvenirs, apparel, and gifts at shopping centers and boutiques. 'Coastal Grand Mall' offers a wide variety of stores. Driving distance: 15-20 minutes.
nearbyCategories.image_prompt: Photorealistic image of a vibrant shopping mall exterior in Myrtle Beach, with shoppers strolling and browsing storefronts. Sunny weather and a bustling atmosphere.

nearbyCategories.category: Transportation Options: Car Rentals and Public Transit
nearbyCategories.description: Access convenient transportation options with car rental agencies near the airport. Driving distance to the airport: 20-30 minutes.
nearbyCategories.image_prompt: Photorealistic image of a car rental agency office in Myrtle Beach, with a customer picking up their rental car. The agency's logo is visible and the scene is welcoming.

nearbyCategories.category: Essential Vacation Services: Pharmacies and Healthcare
nearbyCategories.description: Easily access pharmacies like 'CVS Pharmacy' for any medical needs. Walking/Driving distance: 5-10 minutes.
nearbyCategories.image_prompt: Photorealistic image of a pharmacy storefront in Myrtle Beach, with a welcoming entrance and visible signage. Clean and well-lit environment.

nearbyCategories.description: Enjoy world-class golfing at nearby golf courses. 'Pine Lakes Country Club' is a great option. Driving distance: 10-20 minutes.
nearbyCategories.image_prompt: Photorealistic image of a beautiful golf course in Myrtle Beach, with lush green fairways, blue skies, and a golfer teeing off. Focus on the scenic landscape.

nearbyCategories.category: Beach Access Points and Oceanfront Activities
nearbyCategories.description: Direct access to the beach! Enjoy swimming, sunbathing, and watersports right outside your door. The main beach access points are directly across Ocean Boulevard. Walking distance: Less than 1 minute.
nearbyCategories.image_prompt: Photorealistic image of a sunny beach scene in Myrtle Beach, with families enjoying the sand and surf. Bright blue water, clear skies, and beach umbrellas dotting the landscape.
